name: AI Lead Routing - GHL Qualification & Assignment

nodes.name: GHL Lead Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives inbound lead webhooks from GoHighLevel. Configure in GHL: Settings > Integrations > Webhooks > Add Webhook URL. Fires on: contact.create, form.submitted, opportunity.created

nodes.name: Normalize Lead Data
nodes.notes: Normalizes the GHL webhook payload into a consistent lead object regardless of which GHL event fired it.

nodes.name: Has Valid Email?
nodes.notes: Gate: only process leads with an email address. Invalid leads go to the false branch for logging.

parameters.name: system
parameters.value:
You are an expert B2B sales qualification AI. Your job is to analyze inbound leads and score them using BANT criteria (Budget, Authority, Need, Timeline).

You MUST respond with ONLY valid JSON — no preamble, no markdown, no explanation.

Scoring rules:
- score: integer 1-100 (100 = perfect lead)
- tier: "hot" (score 75-100), "warm" (score 45-74), "cold" (score 1-44)
- budget_signal: true if any dollar amounts, company size, or budget language detected
- authority_signal: true if title suggests decision maker (CEO, Director, VP, Owner, Founder, Manager)
- need_signal: true if clear problem, pain point, or requirement stated
- timeline_signal: true if urgency language detected (urgent, ASAP, this month, this quarter, deadline)
- assigned_team: "enterprise" (score ≥80 OR pipeline_value ≥10000), "smb" (score 45-79), "nurture" (score <45)
- priority: "high" (hot tier), "medium" (warm tier), "low" (cold tier)
- qualification_notes: 2-3 sentence summary of why this score
- follow_up_action: specific recommended first action for the sales rep
- follow_up_delay_minutes: 0 for hot, 30 for warm, 120 for cold

Respond with exactly this JSON structure:
{
  "score": 0,
  "tier": "cold",
  "budget_signal": false,
  "authority_signal": false,
  "need_signal": false,
  "timeline_signal": false,
  "assigned_team": "nurture",
  "priority": "low",
  "qualification_notes": "",
  "follow_up_action": "",
  "follow_up_delay_minutes": 120
}

nodes.name: AI Lead Qualifier
nodes.notes: Calls Claude to score and qualify the lead using BANT criteria. Returns structured JSON with tier, score, assigned_team, and follow-up recommendations.

nodes.name: Parse AI Qualification
nodes.notes: Parses Claude's JSON response and merges qualification data with the lead object. Handles parse failures gracefully with a fallback scoring.

nodes.name: GHL: Tag Hot Lead
nodes.notes: Tags the GHL contact with ai-hot-enterprise, ai-qualified, and score-{N} for pipeline filtering.

nodes.name: GHL: Create Hot Opportunity
nodes.notes: Creates a GHL opportunity in the Enterprise pipeline stage for hot leads. Replace YOUR_PIPELINE_ID, YOUR_HOT_STAGE_ID, and YOUR_ENTERPRISE_USER_ID with real values from your GHL account.

nodes.name: GHL: Create Urgent Task
nodes.notes: Creates a 5-minute follow-up task in GHL for hot leads with full AI qualification notes attached.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "title": "♨️ WARM LEAD — Follow up within 30 min: {{ $json.full_name }}",
  "body": "AI Score: {{ $json.score }}/100\nTier: WARM\nTeam: {{ $json.assigned_team }}\n\n{{ $json.qualification_notes }}\n\nRecommended Action: {{ $json.follow_up_action }}",
  "dueDate": "={{ $now.plus({ minutes: 30 }).toISO() }}",
  "contactId": "{{ $json.ghl_contact_id }}",
  "assignedTo": "YOUR_SMB_USER_ID",
  "status": "incompleted"
}

nodes.name: GHL: Enroll in Nurture Workflow
nodes.notes: Enrolls cold leads into a GHL nurture automation sequence. Replace YOUR_NURTURE_WORKFLOW_ID with your actual GHL workflow ID.

nodes.name: Build Slack Notification
nodes.notes: Builds a rich Slack Block Kit message with lead details, AI score bar, BANT breakdown, and routing info.

nodes.name: Slack: Notify Sales Team
nodes.notes: Posts the AI-scored lead notification to the appropriate Slack channel based on tier (#leads-enterprise, #leads-smb, #leads-nurture).

nodes.name: Log Routing Result
nodes.notes: Logs the full routing result for analytics. In production, swap console.log for a database insert or a call to your analytics platform.

nodes.name: Log Invalid Lead
nodes.notes: Sends a warning to #leads-ops for any lead missing an email address so the team can investigate the source.
